hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams monitor and assess on-chain transaction risks instantly by connecting wallet activity, sanctions exposure, and provider signals into actionable workflows and audit evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to act quickly when transaction risk data and alerts come from multiple disconnected sources. This fragmentation causes slower review cycles and weakens the link between real-time risks and structured compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links real-time wallet and transaction risk signals, sanctions data and source-of-funds analysis into one structured workflow that centralizes reviews, escalations, evidence and case management for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals in real time then routes alerts into structured cases with supporting evidence for timely compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into structured cases, decisions and evidence to support faster, auditable compliance review and real-time response workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with secure provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to support faster, defensible transaction screening and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support real-time transaction screening workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts connect to case management
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves real-time screening decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for wallet and transaction risk
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for real-time transaction screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into structured reviews, cases and decisions for real-time compliance response in digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle transaction alert workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes transaction alerts into workflows that enable triage, case creation, review assignment, escalation and linkage to related wallet or counterparty data.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve transaction evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence, including alert details, decision logs and supporting blockchain analytics, to support traceability and review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers, consolidating their outputs into one compliance operating layer without disrupting existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace transaction monitoring providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace monitoring providers; it sits above them to connect outputs into scalable workflows, cases and audit evidence.
final_title: Connect real-time transaction alerts into workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures wallet risk, sanctions exposure and case evidence for faster, auditable compliance response.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
